# tests/fixtures — provenance index

Per the
[`273v/kaos-modules` fixture-provenance policy](https://github.com/273v/kaos-modules/blob/main/docs/oss/50-data-and-fixtures/provenance-policy.md),
every fixture directory carries documented source / license /
retrieval-date / SHA-256 metadata. This directory holds the
multimodal smoke-test corpus for `kaos-llm-client`:

- 4 generated geometric images (PIL-rendered solid shapes) — colour /
  shape recognition smoke tests across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google.
- 1 generated bar chart (matplotlib) — chart-understanding smoke test.
- 2 NASA public-domain astronomy photos — real-image recognition
  smoke tests (Moon, Sun).
- 2 generated audio tones (numpy + `wave`) — Gemini audio-input
  smoke tests.
- 1 hand-crafted PDF — Anthropic / Gemini document-input smoke tests.

All nine fixtures were committed together in monorepo commit
[`c40c108`](https://github.com/273v/kaos-modules/commit/c40c108fd3b6daa575cca744a027cc1b77d72c54)
("Add kaos-llm-client: thin provider-native LLM transport layer",
2026-04-06) whose message reads "Real fixtures: PIL images, NASA
photos, numpy audio, hand-crafted PDF." Consumers live in
[`tests/integration/test_live.py`](../integration/test_live.py).

| `nasa_moon_galileo.jpg` | NASA / JPL Galileo Solid State Imaging (SSI) photo of Earth's Moon, catalog ID **PIA00405** — see `tests/integration/test_live.py:450`. Original at <https://photojournal.jpl.nasa.gov/catalog/PIA00405>. Downsized to 640x640 for this fixture. | public-domain (NASA / JPL — 17 USC §105) | 2026-04-06 | `174d4c5af381d3b846afa08f83fe55b8779c6d0964f886aa8d51a08d8db81322` |

Original at <https://photojournal.jpl.nasa.gov/catalog/PIA03149>. Downsized to 640x619 for this fixture. | public-domain (NASA / ESA — 17 USC §105; SOHO is a NASA/ESA cooperative project, imagery released to public domain) | 2026-04-06 | `0d8831c710c37b30bac5f144d7f21f4920575c6aca7b7a8691f83a047be34102` |
| `a440_tone.wav` | Hand-generated by 273V via numpy + `wave` stdlib — 1-second 440 Hz sine wave, 16-bit PCM mono @ 16 kHz | hand-crafted, 273V (public-domain test fixture) | 2026-04-06 | `01e8626c02f05ab267d200e4bc7a72a34b4bd9dcfc507591d118441a27da718c` |
| `freq_sweep.wav` | Hand-generated by 273V via numpy + `wave` stdlib — short frequency sweep, 16-bit PCM mono @ 16 kHz | hand-crafted, 273V (public-domain test fixture) | 2026-04-06 | `4016a9f664d27127b0484233c6c3e31c748cf379b132cc4f2316fd06d665e7d8` |
| `hello_world.pdf` | Hand-crafted by 273V — minimal PDF 1.4, single page, "Hello world"-style payload for document-input smoke tests | hand-crafted, 273V (public-domain test fixture) | 2026-04-06 | `fc1daa4fc03e000fe5128b17aaab7e99bd3a32a00500af1eaeffcef4657339e0` |

The two NASA catalog IDs (`PIA00405`, `PIA03149`) are recorded in the
docstrings of `TestOpenAIMultimodal.test_nasa_moon_description` and
`TestAnthropicMultimodal.test_nasa_sun_description` in
`tests/integration/test_live.py` — those are the canonical upstream
references.

## Forbidden content

Nothing in this directory is sourced from a 273V customer engagement,
non-public Slack/email, or attorney-client-privileged material. The
geometric shapes, audio tones, and PDF are hand-crafted by 273V for
the express purpose of being multimodal test fixtures. The NASA
photos are US-government public-domain works under 17 USC §105.

## Re-computing SHA-256s

```bash
git ls-files tests/fixtures/ | xargs sha256sum
```

If a SHA in this table drifts, either an upstream NASA URL moved
(re-record with `Retrieved` updated) or a hand-crafted fixture was
regenerated (don't — keep fixtures pinned). Generated fixtures are
not deterministic by default; if you need to regenerate, record the
new SHA in this README in the same commit.
